## Checklist

- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] Follows the [design system](../docs/styles/design-system.md) for UI changes
- [ ] No plaintext or passwords sent to the server (for crypto-touching changes)
- [ ] Screenshot included (for UI changes)
